text:
penalty kick, type of direct free kick in association football, also known as 14th Law of association football. Attributes include: 
- Commons category: "Penalty kick (association football)"
- sport: "association football"
- subclass of: "direct free kick",
 "penalty shot"
- part of: "Laws of the Game"
- follows: "free kick"
- followed by: "throw-in"
- different from: "penalty shoot-out"
